case_title: TEGSCO LLC VS. CHARLES ROY WENTWORTH

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WENTWORTH, CHARLES ROY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN (VP EMERITUS, TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE). DEFENDANT CHARLES ROY WENTWORTH IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2023 - JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN (VP EMERITUS, TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC
